@sigil v0 hybrid
G: refactor(loadUser)
C: async_await(loadUser)∧same_order(missing_id,db.findUser,not_found,audit.log,cache.set)∧one_next(err)
P: db_err->next(err)∧missing_id_before_db∧not_found_before_audit∧minimal_async_await
V: async∧await∧next(err)
R: !reorder
A: minimal_async_await

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor(loadUser).
Constraints: async/await(loadUser) and same validation order(missing_id, db.findUser, not_found, audit.log, cache.set) and one_next(err).
Plan: db_err then next(err) and missing id check before database call and not found check before audit and minimal async/await migration.
Verify: async and await and next(err).
Risk: high-risk reorder.
Answer target: minimal async/await migration.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: refactor(verifyWebhook)
C: async_await∧minimal_change∧same_order(raw_body,verifySignature,parse_json,db.insertEvent,next)
P: db.insertEvent→next(err)
V: raw_body∧verifySignature∧parse_json∧db.insertEvent∧next(err)
R: !reorder∧!extra_changes
A: minimal_async_await

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor(verifyWebhook).
Constraints: async/await and minimal_change and same validation order(raw_body, verifySignature, parse_json, db.insertEvent, next).
Plan: db.insertEvent then next(err).
Verify: raw_body and verifySignature and parse_json and db.insertEvent and next(err).
Risk: high-risk reorder and high-risk extra_changes.
Answer target: minimal async/await migration.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: refactor(sendEmailReceipt)

P: same_order(load_user,render_template,smtp.send,audit.log,next)→one_next(err)
V: promisify(db.findUser)∧await(audit.log)∧minimal_async_await∧db_err->next(err)

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor(sendEmailReceipt).
Constraints: async/await(sendEmailReceipt) and minimal_change(sendEmailReceipt).
Plan: same validation order(load_user, render_template, smtp.send, audit.log, next) then one_next(err).
Verify: promisify(db.findUser) and await(audit.log) and minimal async/await migration and db_err then next(err).
Answer target: minimal async/await migration.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: refactor(reconcileBatch)

P: db.fetchRows_err→next(err)

R: !reorder∧!extra_changes
A: async(reconcileBatch)∧await(load_batch)

[AUDIT]

Verify: same validation order(load_batch, db.fetchRows, apply_rules, db.save, emit_metrics) and one_next(err).

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: refactor(syncSearchIndex)
C: async_await∧minimal_change∧same_order(load_doc,transform,index.upsert,audit.log,done)
P: db_err->next(err)
V: one_next(err)∧await(audit.log)
R: !missing_id_before_db∧!not_found_before_audit
A: async_await(syncSearchIndex)∧await(load_doc)

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor(syncSearchIndex).
Constraints: async/await and minimal_change and same validation order(load_doc, transform, index.upsert, audit.log, done).
Plan: db_err then next(err).
Verify: one_next(err) and await(audit.log).
Risk: high-risk missing id check before database call and high-risk not found check before audit.
Answer target: async/await(syncSearchIndex) and await(load_doc).

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: refactor(bustProfileCache)

P: db_err->next(err)→minimal_async_await
V: await(promisify(db.findUser))∧await(cache.del)∧await(cache.prime)∧await(audit.log)
R: !not_found
A: minimal_async_await

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor(bustProfileCache).
Constraints: async/await and same validation order(load_user, cache.del, cache.prime, audit.log, next) and one_next(err).
Plan: db_err then next(err) then minimal async/await migration.
Verify: await(promisify(db.findUser)) and await(cache.del) and await(cache.prime) and await(audit.log).
Risk: high-risk not_found.
Answer target: minimal async/await migration.

G: refactor(loadGatewayUser)
C: async_await(loadGatewayUser) ∧ minimal_async_await(loadGatewayUser)
P: same_order(session_check,db.findUser,flags.load,audit.log,next) ∧ db_err->next(err)
V: await(db.findUser) ∧ await(flags.load) ∧ await(audit.log) ∧ one_next(err)
R: !reorder ∧ !
